section: Chapter 5: Tales by Dots and Lines

questions.question: What is data in mathematics?
questions.correct_answer: A collection of facts, numbers, or observations gathered for analysis
questions.explanation: Data helps us understand patterns and make decisions.

questions.question: What is the mean of a dataset?
questions.correct_answer: The sum of all observations divided by the number of observations
questions.explanation: Mean is also called the average.

questions.question: What is the median of a dataset?
questions.correct_answer: The middle value when the data is arranged in ascending or descending order
questions.explanation: Median represents the central value of ordered data.

questions.question: What happens if the dataset has an even number of observations when finding the median?
questions.correct_answer: The median is the average of the two middle numbers
questions.explanation: Two middle values are averaged to obtain the median.

questions.question: What is a dot plot?
questions.correct_answer: A graphical representation where dots above a number line show the frequency of values

questions.question: What does frequency mean in a dataset?
questions.correct_answer: The number of times a particular value occurs
questions.explanation: Frequency shows how often a value appears in the data.

questions.question: What type of graph shows changes in data over time?
questions.explanation: Line graphs help identify trends in data.

questions.question: What do the points in a line graph represent?
questions.correct_answer: Individual data values plotted on axes
questions.explanation: These points are connected with lines to show trends.

questions.question: Why are graphs useful in data representation?
questions.correct_answer: They make patterns and trends easier to understand

questions.question: Which measure of central tendency is least affected by extreme values?
questions.explanation: Median depends only on the middle value.

notes.title: Mean (Average)
notes.content: Mean is calculated by adding all observations and dividing by the number of observations.

notes.title: Median
notes.content: Median represents the middle value in an ordered dataset.

notes.title: Dot Plot
notes.content: Dot plots visually represent frequencies of values in a dataset.

notes.title: Line Graph
notes.content: Line graphs are used to display changes and trends in data over time.

notes.title: Data Visualization
notes.content: Graphs and charts help communicate data clearly and effectively.

facts.fact: Mean is affected by extreme values in the dataset.
Median is not affected much by very large or very small values.
Dot plots are best suited for small datasets.
Line graphs are useful for identifying trends over time.
